rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0010
rows.name: Ever since Void's appearance,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0020
rows.name:
the Growth remnants that had been lying
low all over have begun to stir again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0030
rows.name:
The disappearance phenomenon and the Ghosts
should be a threat to them as well, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0040
rows.name:
Gaining a new objective must
have raised their morale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0050
rows.name: Objective[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0060
rows.name: That floating continent where Void is, huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0070
rows.name:
Treating that place as holy ground, those who
heard Void's voice have begun a pilgrimage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0080
rows.name:
To aim for a new world
together with their creator[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0090
rows.name: For the Growth, who were treated as remnants[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0100
rows.name: and living like hermits,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0110
rows.name: it is the ultimate motivation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0120
rows.name: I wish they'd just gather quietly, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0130
rows.name: They're causing trouble all over the place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0140
rows.name: Emboldened by that newfound vigor,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0150
rows.name:
they're rioting and looting,
doing whatever they please.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0160
rows.name: It's unbearable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0170
rows.name:
Remember, they were originally a swarm whose goal
was to eradicate us, the descendants of Samaar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0180
rows.name: I suppose that is simply their true nature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0190
rows.name:
I guess this is also part of
the contest for survival.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0200
rows.name: To live on this [System:Ruby rt=Mira ]planet[/System:Ruby].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0210
rows.name:
We've come this far trying to make it
a safe haven, a second home, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0220
rows.name:
Disappearance phenomena, Ghosts, Growth[ST:wide ]― We must
protect our brethren from all these threats[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0240
rows.name: To do that[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0250
rows.name:
We must retrieve the core from Void
and transfer to another world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0260
rows.name:
In other words, we have no path
left but to abandon this [System:Ruby rt=Mira ]planet[/System:Ruby].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0270
rows.name: Essentially,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0280
rows.name: it's the Second Project Exodus.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0290
rows.name:
Just when we finally chased Luxaar off
and our circle was starting to expand[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0300
rows.name: Tell me about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0310
rows.name: We were just getting used to life here, too[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_JNK0010
rows.name: Sadness

rows.label: xs32020100_SEL0010
rows.name: Express anger that you don't want to abandon it.

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0320
rows.name: It truly breaks my heart.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_JNK0020
rows.name: Acceptance

rows.label: xs32020100_SEL0020
rows.name: Accept that it can't be helped.

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0330
rows.name: Yeah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0340
rows.name: I know it, but still[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0350
rows.name: I understand how everyone feels.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0360
rows.name: But...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0370
rows.name: We have to face reality.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0380
rows.name:
The disappearance phenomenon is expanding
without pause, steadily swallowing this planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0390
rows.name: This fact cannot be changed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0400
rows.name:
This time, we are not limiting
it to Earthlings alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0410
rows.name: We will evacuate "all races" living on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0420
rows.name: All races[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0430
rows.name:
Of course, that means "all races"
who agree to our proposal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0440
rows.name: Unfortunately,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0450
rows.name:
lifeforms we cannot communicate
with are fundamentally excluded.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0460
rows.name: That's quite[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0470
rows.name: How should I put it... egoistic.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_JNK0030
rows.name: Anger

rows.label: xs32020100_SEL0030
rows.name: Protest that we must not select which lives to save.

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0480
rows.name: I understand your feelings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0490
rows.name: I don't want to do it either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0500
rows.name: But, practically speaking, it is difficult.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0510
rows.name:
There are harmful ones,
ferocious ones, all kinds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0520
rows.name:
With the remaining time and our current personnel,
we cannot possibly accommodate them all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_JNK0040
rows.name: Resignation

rows.label: xs32020100_SEL0040
rows.name: Agree that it is practically difficult.

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0530
rows.name: Exactly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0540
rows.name: If possible, I wouldn't want to do it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0550
rows.name:
However, humanity has selected life based on
their own convenience countless times before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0560
rows.name: We are not gods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0570
rows.name:
We are merely lifeforms living with
the sin of selfishness on our backs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0580
rows.name: But[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0590
rows.name: Even so, is it even possible[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0595
rows.name: to take every race?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0600
rows.name: That's right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0610
rows.name:
If we are to construct a ship
for evacuation from scratch,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0620
rows.name:
it would require a massive amount
of time and considerable size.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0630
rows.name:
As for the ship, we have secured
the Ma-non's cooperation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0640
rows.name:
We're using that Ma-non
ship floating over NLA?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0650
rows.name: Correct.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0660
rows.name:
Based on our calculations, that ship
has enough capacity for every race.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0670
rows.name: Building a transfer system using the Ares,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0680
rows.name:
and loading the Central Life's protoplasmic
fluid will require various retrofits, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0690
rows.name:
if we cooperate, it will be finished before
the disappearance phenomenon reaches us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0700
rows.name:
As the old saying goes, "killing
three birds with one stone."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0710
rows.name:
Yeah, that means everything
is going perfectly smoothly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0720
rows.name:
We have communicated the plan to the
areas where confirmed races live.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0730
rows.name:
Some have replied that they will
share their fate with Mira, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0740
rows.name: the majority have begun moving toward NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0750
rows.name: We can't afford to take it easy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0760
rows.name: Right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0770
rows.name:
From now on, every active BLADE
member's highest priority[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0780
rows.name: is making this plan a success.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0790
rows.name: At this stage, there are two main tasks:[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0800
rows.name:
Cooperation in constructing the escape ship, and
assistance for those wishing to migrate to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0810
rows.name: This is a state of emergency.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0820
rows.name:
You may be assigned missions
regardless of Union affiliation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0830
rows.name: Please be prepared.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32020100_MSG0840
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]
